name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: Garland, TX: PLS Check Cashers offers 24-hour check cashing services at 780 E Centerville Rd with fast, convenient transactions.
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers stands at 780 E Centerville Rd in central Garland, TX, providing a convenient standalone location for residents and visitors seeking reliable check-cashing services. The store operates 24 hours every day of the week, making it accessible for early morning, late night, and weekend transactions whenever you need to cash a check. Its round-the-clock availability makes it a go-to choice for Garland residents managing unexpected schedules or urgent financial needs.

At this Garland location, you can cash paychecks, insurance checks, tax refunds, and government benefit checks with minimal wait time. The trained staff can answer questions about required documentation and help ensure your transaction is smooth and secure. Contact the store at +1 972-926-6800 to inquire about specific check types, limits, or services available at this location in Garland, TX.

For residents of Garland seeking quick cash without a bank account, PLS Check Cashers provides a straightforward alternative with no minimum requirements. Bring a valid government-issued ID and your check, and you'll be processed promptly. The 24-hour schedule at this East Centerville Road location means you can handle your financial needs on your own timeline.
pros: Open 24/7 across all service categories — uncommon for check-cashing centers
Illinois DMV services (registration, title transfers, license plates) available on-site
Ria Money Transfer enables international remittances in the same visit
Notary services for legal documents including wills, trusts, and power of attorney
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard with mobile app for unbanked customers
Foreign currency exchange available alongside standard money services
Operates in 12 states with a consistent, broad service menu
cons: No fee schedule published on the website — check cashing rates are undisclosed
Xpectations! prepaid card terms and fees are not disclosed in available content
No lending products — not useful for consumers needing credit, loans, or advances
Services are branch-only; no online or mobile check cashing capability indicated
Consumers with bank accounts will pay less elsewhere for most of these services
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing check cashing and bill pay
Illinois residents needing DMV services (registration, title transfers) outside business hours
Consumers sending international money transfers via Ria
Individuals needing notary services for legal documents on nights or weekends
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need cash access, bill payment, or Illinois DMV services outside standard business hours. The 24/7 availability and unusually broad service menu — including notary, DMV, and international wire — are genuine advantages over most competitors. Consumers with bank accounts will pay less elsewhere for nearly every service PLS offers.
services: Notary Services (wills, deeds, trusts, power of attorney)
meta_description: PLS Check Cashers at 780 E Centerville Rd, Garland, TX. 24-hour check cashing services, no bank account needed, valid ID required.
